description: Status Lock is a meta-game where you need to collect varius crystals to unlock statuses

v0.2.0.description:
## Changes
- Added gen checks (max 1 status lock per multiworld + user confirmation)
- Added client (NOT AUTOMATIC _yet_, you need to do /copy_lines and paste that in the host console)
- Disabled all filler goal, no filler/traps are generated at the moment to prevent overflowing the item pool
v0.2.0.title: Full client release

v0.3.0.description:
This update adds automatically sending the admin commands to the server.
A few useful commands:
 - /set_password: 
     - sets the admin password for the current connection (nothing to delete the password)
     - will overwrite previous passwords of seeds with the exact same player list
     - password is automatically encrypted, only decrypted when used to send the room changes (the encryption key is unique per device)
- /load_keys: loads all (encrypted) passwords
- /save: save the current (encrypted) passwords (and deletion thereof)
- /tray: move the window to a tray icon so you can have it running in the background without bothering you (only available on os with tray icons)
v0.3.0.title: The Automatic Update (ταυ)

v0.3.1.description:
Add EN and FR doc
Add a setting to skip the confirmation at generation
v0.3.1.title: The mini-patch

v0.3.2.description: Fix auto collect and auto release not working with no shards
v0.3.2.title: Bug fix (auto collect & auto release with no shards)

v0.4.0.description:
- Release and collect for players that goaled and are disconnected (the network protocol is shit for everything about goals):
  - If using /copy_lines it will be copied
  - If using the automated password, it will send a countdown of 10 seconds\* before doing it
- Fix release and collect modes set to enabled instead of goal once enough shards were obtained
- Increase auto-release and auto-collect max shard amounts to 100

\*10 seconds is the supposed time but asyncio.sleep ends the 10 seconds while the server countdown is only at 5 (tested on localhost). Therefore asyncio.sleep is called to wait 20 seconds instead.
v0.4.0.title: Release and collect for disconnected players

v0.4.1.description: This uses rule_builder so the minimum ap version had to be upped to 0.6.7
v0.4.1.title: FIX: Goal logic missing
